global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, abstract shapes, and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting hotel and flight bookings with a focus on ease and rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the word 'WayPoint' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a circle and a square, rendered in a soft blue color, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A prominent text block stating 'Dream destinations await Hotels + flights in one tap' in a clear, legible font, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: destinations await Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: WayPoint
elements.description: The word 'WayPoint' displayed at the top of the ad in a large, bold font, conveying the brand identity.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' in a smaller font, centered above the main message, adding emphasis to the ad's theme.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A call-to-action button labeled 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, positioned at the bottom of the ad to encourage user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, WayPoint logo, call-to-action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by abstract shapes in the center, the main message at the bottom, and the CTA at the very bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: destinations await Hotels + flights in one tap, WayPoint, Dream, Claim reward
